title: Yanzi
description: Cool stuff with create and trains that can derail. Lose health every time you die.
body: Modpack to join friends and you lose hearts every time you die. A galore collection of things to explore and the time for villagers has come with each having a name. Have you ever wanted to be three blocks tall, no well you can be one block tall instead. Are you having trouble exploring well it's even harder now having to worry about temperature(don't freeze). I hope you don't struggle with food because you need water now; drink up.
